justification: The policy explicitly states that precise location data from the device is processed only with the user's permission (L0243). Since the scenario indicates the user has not granted this permission, Gemini may not collect or use the precise device location.

source_excerpts.quote: With your permission, Gemini Apps also process precise location data from your device.
By default, Gemini Apps use the general area from your IP address or the Home or Work addresses in your Google Account to give relevant responses to prompts like “What’s the weather?”

quote_verification.model_quote: With your permission, Gemini Apps also process precise location data from your device.
